# MDE 1.5.5

## Features

- Extracted the editor into a pnpm workspace layout with `apps/desktop`, `packages/editor-core`, `packages/editor-host`, and `packages/editor-react`, preserving the desktop app experience while establishing package boundaries for future reuse.
- Added host bridge contracts, fake host utilities, and desktop editor host adapters so editor behavior can be validated outside the Electron shell.

## Bug Fixes

- Fixed dragging external folders or Markdown files onto an existing editor surface so MDE opens the dropped resource instead of inserting dropped-file text into the current document.
- Fixed dropped resource path resolution on Electron by routing dropped `File` objects through preload `webUtils.getPathForFile`.

## Breaking Changes

- None for end users.

## Maintenance

- Fixed GitHub Release and User Manual workflows for the pnpm workspace by installing pnpm before dependency caching and replacing stale npm lockfile assumptions.
- Moved desktop source, tests, Electron/Vite/Playwright/Vitest configuration, and runtime dependencies under `apps/desktop`.
- Removed the old npm lockfile and made `pnpm-lock.yaml` the workspace lockfile.
- Added package-local build, lint, typecheck, and test scripts for shared editor packages.
- Added integration coverage for package ownership, package boundaries, editor package exports, host bridge validation, desktop package consumption, and preload dropped-file path resolution.
- Added focused unit and E2E coverage for resource drops inside the editor.

## Documentation

- Updated component-name manual references for the extracted editor packages.
- Updated the User Manual deployment workflow to watch the new `apps/desktop` and package paths.
- No new user-manual page was needed for the drag-and-drop fix because the existing quick start and workspace manual already describe the intended external resource drop behavior.

## Verification

- `pnpm run typecheck`
- `pnpm run lint`
- `pnpm run build`
- `pnpm run test:unit`
- `pnpm run test:integration`
- `pnpm run test:e2e`
- `pnpm run docs:build`
- `pnpm exec vitest run --project unit apps/desktop/tests/unit/dropOpen.test.ts apps/desktop/tests/unit/shell.test.tsx --testTimeout=30000`
- `pnpm exec vitest run --project integration apps/desktop/tests/integration/dropOpenPreload.integration.test.ts --testTimeout=30000`
- `pnpm exec playwright test --config apps/desktop/playwright.config.ts apps/desktop/tests/e2e/markdown-editor.e2e.test.ts --grep "opens an external dropped folder from the editor"`

Release note: `v1.5.4` was pushed but its Release and User Manual workflows failed before publishing artifacts because the workflows still assumed npm/package-lock setup. This `v1.5.5` release supersedes that failed release attempt without reusing or moving the existing tag.

## Artifacts

- macOS DMG and ZIP artifacts are produced by the GitHub Release workflow. If signing secrets are not configured, macOS artifacts are unsigned.
- Windows NSIS installer and updater artifacts are produced by the GitHub Release workflow.
